_note: 2026-07-12 Tier 3 batch: dedicated English-language MBA programs at Bar-Ilan, Hebrew University, and Tel Aviv University, per the 'English-language BA/MBA options' item. Verified as genuinely distinct from the already-listed general undergraduate study-abroad entries at these same universities (israel-xp-bar-ilan-university-overseas-student-program, rothberg-international-school, tau-international-study-abroad-semesteryear) -- none of those mention an MBA. Hebrew University runs two separately-enrolled MBA tracks (StartUp 360 and Med-Tech Innovation), each given its own entry per the one-org-many-tracks rule discussed in this workstream. Sourced from imba.biu.ac.il, imba.huji.ac.il, and en-coller.tau.ac.il (all fetched 2026-07-12). No pricing/tuition info included. A standalone English BA-degree gap (distinct from the existing study-abroad entries) was checked for but not found well-documented enough to add without risking guesswork -- left out per the 'omit unverifiable details rather than guess' rule.

university_mba_programs.name: Bar-Ilan University International MBA
university_mba_programs.description: A 15-month English-language MBA at Bar-Ilan University's School of Business Administration, combining alternating on-campus and online sessions with coursework in entrepreneurship, global management, finance, and marketing; includes a study tour to China and draws an international cohort of 30-35 students per class.

university_mba_programs.name: Hebrew University Business School - StartUp 360 MBA
university_mba_programs.description: A one-year, AACSB-accredited English-language MBA at the Hebrew University Business School focused on entrepreneurship, strategy, and innovation, combining coursework taught by Israeli and international faculty with a year-long internship placement at a startup or venture capital firm; open to applicants from both business and non-business backgrounds.

university_mba_programs.name: Hebrew University Business School - Med-Tech Innovation MBA
university_mba_programs.description: A one-year, AACSB-accredited English-language MBA at the Hebrew University Business School combining business fundamentals with biomedical-sector knowledge, taught by Israeli and international faculty with a year-long internship placement; open to applicants from business, scientific, or medical backgrounds.

university_mba_programs.name: Tel Aviv University Sofaer Global MBA
university_mba_programs.description: The Coller School of Management's flagship English-language, AACSB-accredited MBA at Tel Aviv University, focused on entrepreneurship and new-venture creation through hands-on hackathons and accelerators; caps each cohort at 50 students drawn from 40+ countries, with an internship component and access to a 500+-member alumni network.
